init.key_prompt: Paste your Anthropic API key (starts with sk-ant-)
init.locale_prompt: Choose the language for the CLI and exercises
init.key_exists: An API key is already saved. Overwrite?
init.locale_exists: A locale is already saved: {locale}. Overwrite?
list.hint: Run an exercise's tests: aidev verify <id>
verify.not_found: Exercise '{id}' not found. Try: aidev list
verify.no_key_hint: Run 'aidev init' to configure, or export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
common.stale_warning: ⚠ Exercise is stale (valid_until: {valid_until}). Pricing, models, or APIs may have changed. Continuing anyway…
run.title: ▶ Running {id} ({target})
run.truncated: [... truncated {n} chars, use --full to see all]
run.not_found: Exercise '{id}' not found. Try: aidev list
open.not_found: Exercise '{id}' not found. Try: aidev list
open.no_editor: No editor found. Export $EDITOR or install VS Code (command: code).
init.next_steps:
Next steps:
  1. aidev list     → see all exercises
  2. aidev next     → start the first one
  3. aidev progress → track your completion
init.action_prompt: What do you want to do?
init.reset_confirm: This will erase all your progress and restore original starter.ts files. Continue?
init.reset_done: Progress reset. Start again with: aidev next
init.update_stash_conflict: ⚠ Conflicts while restoring your changes. Run 'git stash pop' manually to resolve them.
init.update_done: Exercises updated to the latest version.
init.update_failed: Update failed. Check your connection or run 'git pull' manually.
init.update_no_git: No git repository found. Did you clone the repo correctly?
